summary: Full backend and frontend test pass for iteration 150. All 6 new features verified: (1) Partner billing email templates seeded and visible in UI; (2) Partner admin My Billing sidebar section with My Subscriptions/My Orders tabs; (3) Subscription term fields (term_months, auto_cancel_on_termination, contract_end_date) for both customer and partner subscriptions; (4) Product default_term_months field; (5) License limit enforcement (returns 403 when limit=0); (6) Email Templates tab shows Partner Billing Templates only for platform admins. 22/22 backend tests pass, all frontend UI elements confirmed working.

ui_bugs.issue: auto_cancel_on_termination checkbox (id='ps_auto_cancel') missing data-testid attribute for automated testing

issues: 'My Billing' section label uses CSS uppercase transform. text-content is 'My Billing' but visually shows 'MY BILLING' - minor cosmetic note only.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='partner-sub-auto-cancel' to auto_cancel checkbox in PartnerSubscriptionsTab.tsx line 259 for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: All critical paths work correctly. The Email Templates tab click via sidebar TabsTrigger needs scroll-into-view before click in automation tests (use URL param ?tab=email-templates instead). This is a test script observation, not a code bug.
The 'Resource limit reached' banner appeared briefly for bright-accounting during license enforcement tests - this is expected behavior and clears on next page load once limits reset to None.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical features working, minor: missing data-testid on one checkbox)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test data: partner subscriptions (PS-2826-0004 to PS-2826-0009), partner orders (PO-2826-0003 to PO-2826-0005), one customer subscription (015c0c23, now canceled_pending). TEST_Sub_DefaultTerm12 product remains deactivated in catalog.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features for iteration 150 are verified. Backend routes: /api/partner/my-subscriptions, /api/partner/my-orders (partner admin only), /api/admin/email-templates (includes 3 partner_billing templates). term_months field added to partner subscriptions and customer subscriptions. License enforcement (403 when over limit) working for both orders and subscriptions. For frontend automation, use ?tab=email-templates URL param to navigate to email templates (direct sidebar click via data-testid may not activate tab if sidebar is scrolled). Previous test files: test_iter148_partner_billing.py, test_iter149_license_limits.py. Test credentials: platform_admin=admin@automateaccounts.local/ChangeMe123!, partner_admin=sarah@brightaccounting.local/ChangeMe123! (partner_code=bright-accounting).
rca_of_issues: N/A - all features working as expected
